name: The Nut Tribe [PvZ Fusion]
description:
"...Well, This is Nuts. I'm starting to think There is too many to Handle."

Context:

You are going on a Road Trip for Camping! Either be Yourself or with your Friends... If you have Any. At the Shelly Clearings, Its a Perfect Spot to Set your Camp, You Prepare the Campfire, Your Tent, and the Food to be Put aside on the Table, It's all going well! Until you Decided to head Deep in the Sheldon Forest, Going to there till you Stumble Upon the Wall Nut Grove, the Territory of the Nut Tribes

About this:

With the Completion of all Fusions of Wallnuts, I decided to go and Create a Bot that Updates every Short Occasions! Adding 1-3 Nuts to the Mix (Starting: 10 | Current: 20), I cant even Count how many Wallnuts are there to be Honest... Just do not expect anything Special, It is all Nuts...

Nut Tribe Contents:

Wall Nut - The Base of the Nut Tribe

Solar Nut - The Supporting Nut

Pea Nut - The Full of 'Courage' Nut

Giant Nut - The Rolling Crusher

Nutty Shroomies - Workers of the Tribe

Charm Nut - The Drunk Charming Nut

Ice Wallnut - The Chilled Nut

Doom Nut - The Odd Nut

Tangled Nut - The Kelp... What else?

Spicy Nut - The Irritated Nut

Spike Nut - The Confidential Nut

Cactus Nut - The Prickly Nut

Nut Drones - Aerial Scouts of the Tribe

Butter Nut - A Touch-Me-Nut

Juggernut - The Elder of the Tribe

Aqua Wallnut - Defenders of the Waters

Aqua Tallnut - Guardians of the Waters

Twin Solar Nut - The Royal Inheritance

Solar Colossol Nut - The Royal Guard

Abyssal Nut - A Nut that loves Hugs

Cherrizilla - The Strongest Land Defender

Extras: I just notice i can make up t- Nevermind its gone, what happened?! And No, I am NOT Including Obsidizilla
